---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed behaviour

Describe how the feature would work. If it involves new inputs or outputs, describe what they'd be called and what values they'd accept.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
